HGSS.109.0000:
Huh?\f
You hear wind blowing into this room?
That is...just me whistling.\f
Enough about that.
Why don’t you buy something? [0200,0000]
HGSS.109.0001:
Arrgh...
You found the secret stairway...\f
How did you do that?
I thought it was well camouflaged...
HGSS.109.0002:
Heheh! The experiment worked like
a charm.\f
MAGIKARP are just worthless, but
GYARADOS are big moneymakers.
HGSS.109.0003:
Urrgh...\f
That guy’s Dragon-type Pokémon
are tough...
HGSS.109.0005:
What took you so long, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
Just as I thought, that strange radio
signal is coming from here.\f
HGSS.109.0006:
What took you so long, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
Just as I thought, that strange radio
signal is coming from here.\f
HGSS.109.0008:
Lance: [0103,0000,0000], we should split up
to check this place. I’ll go first.\f
HGSS.109.0009:
Lance: [0103,0000,0000], we should split up
to check this place. I’ll go first.\f
HGSS.109.0010:
Whistle...whistle...\f
Are you bothered by that noise? That’s
me. My false teeth don’t fit right,\r
and the gap makes the noise.\f
Enough about that.
Why don’t you buy something?\f
HGSS.109.0011:

The variety show is airing
The Pokémon Search Party!
HGSS.109.0012:

HGSS.109.0014:
